messages.content: You must return JSON only. ALL fields in the schema must be present, even if null or empty.

Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: As a mechanic, I've learned to be meticulous about the information I consume, especially on social media. With the rise of fake content, it's become increasingly difficult to separate fact from fiction. I've noticed that my friends and family often share misleading information without verifying its accuracy. This has led me to take a step back and reevaluate my own social media use. I've decided to limit my time on social media and focus on more credible sources of information. I've also started to fact-check information before sharing it with others. It's not always easy, but I believe it's essential in today's digital age. I've come to realize that my high level of extraversion makes me more susceptible to engaging with fake content, but by being more mindful and critical of the information I consume, I've been able to reduce my exposure to it. I understand that this may not be a feasible solution for everyone, but for me, it's been a necessary step in maintaining my sanity in a world filled with misinformation. I've even started to share accurate information with my friends and family to help them distinguish between fact and fiction. It's a small victory, but it's a start. I'm not one for long, drawn-out discussions, but I believe this is an essential topic that needs to be addressed. We need to be more vigilant in our social media use and hold ourselves and others accountable for the information we share. It's a personal responsibility, and one that I'm committed to upholding. I've come to accept my low level of agreeableness, but I've learned to channel it into a more positive force by engaging in constructive conversations with others. I'm not naive to think that this will solve the problem entirely, but I believe it's a step in the right direction. I've also started to explore different hobbies, such as gardening and reading, to help me cope with the stress of dealing with fake content. It's not always easy, but I'm determined to make a difference, one post at a time.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: I evaluated my own social media use and realized the importance of being critical of the information I consume. I've taken steps to limit my time on social media, fact-check information, and share accurate information with others. I've also started to explore different hobbies to help me cope with the stress of dealing with fake content. My high level of extraversion makes me more susceptible to engaging with fake content, but by being more mindful and critical, I've been able to reduce my exposure to it. I've come to accept my low level of agreeableness and have channeled it into a more positive force by engaging in constructive conversations with others.
